text: Pt. Maria Horakova, DOB 22/07/1975, presented with chest pain and dyspnoea since yesterday. BP 145/88, HR 92 bpm, SpO2 94%. ECG: sinus tachycardia. Labs: troponin 0.08 ng/ml, CRP elevated. Dx: suspected NSTEMI (ICD: I21.4). Started on heparin 5000 IU bolus, metoprolol 25mg BID. Referred to cardiology, admission recommended.
